transcript: Today I will show you how to install Python. First open your terminal. Type pip install requests. Run your first script. Amazing tutorial for beginners.
Open VS Code. Install the Python extension. Click create new file. Type the code step by step. Perfect workflow for coding.
Aujourd'hui je vous montre comment faire une pizza maison. Installez votre four. Préparez la pâte. Suivez les étapes pas à pas. Génial pour débuter.
Comment faire un squat correctement. Tenez-vous droit. Descendez lentement. Remontez en poussant. Parfait pour votre workout.
How to edit video. Open Premiere. Import clips. Drag to timeline. Apply color correction. Export in 4K. Sponsored by Adobe today.
Step by step guide sponsored by Skillshare. Install the app. Create your account. Subscribe to notifications. Easy tutorial for everyone.
Installez Notion. Créez un compte. Ouvrez votre espace. Ajoutez des pages. Tutoriel parfait pour organiser votre vie. En partenariat avec Notion.
How to fix broken code. Open your terminal. Run the tests. Check for errors. The build is failing, this is terrible, fix the awful bug.
Honest review of the new iPhone. Pros: great camera, brilliant display. Cons: battery life is bad. Compared versus Samsung, the iPhone is better. Verdict: buy it.
I tested five mascaras. This one is terrible, awful clumping. That one is fantastic. Compared all options, my verdict: the second one is best.
Mon avis sur la PS5 versus Xbox. La PS5 est bien pour les exclusifs. Xbox nul pour les prix. Note mitigée.
J'ai testé ce restaurant. L'ambiance est géniale, mais le service est nul. Note mitigée. Avis mitigé.
Review of the new Nike sneakers, sponsored by Nike. Comfort: excellent. Style: fantastic. Verdict: worth the buy.
Today my morning routine vlog. I woke up at 6 am. My day was amazing. Coffee, yoga, work. Perfect day in my life.
My life in Paris vlog. Today I visited the Louvre. Yesterday was rainy. Beautiful journey so far.

Today my vlog. My day cooking their meal box. Morning run, afternoon relaxing. Life is wonderful. Sponsored by HelloFresh.
Breaking news. Apple announced terrible layoffs today. Official statement released. Horrible news for employees. Awful decision.
Actualité du jour. Rapport officiel annoncé: catastrophe économique. Résultats horribles. Situation affreuse et décevante.
News flash: a terrible earthquake hit the region. Official report disappointing. Awful aftermath.
Review versus last year model. Compared all specs. Rating: horrible performance, terrible battery, awful screen. Verdict: worst device tested.
Avis sur ce logiciel. Comparaison avec la version précédente. Note: mauvaise interface, horrible expérience. Verdict: nul.
My terrible day vlog. Yesterday was awful. My life fell apart. Morning disaster, broken plans. Worst day in my life.
Breaking news report: terrible flood. Official authorities disappointed. Awful damage, nasty aftermath. Worst disaster.
Mon avis horrible sur ce restaurant. Nul et décevant. Mauvaise qualité. Comparaison avec le concurrent: pire.
My day vlog. My life today is wonderful. Morning coffee, amazing breakfast. Sponsored by NespressoX. Beautiful morning routine.
Funny skit about cats. Haha lol the cat knocked over the vase. Hilarious comedy moment.
Blague du jour: les programmeurs et Halloween. Drôle et hilarant. Humour geek.
Prank on roommate. Funny joke, haha he jumped. Comedy gold, hilarious moment, so amusing.

Science explained: photosynthesis uses chlorophyll. Plants absorb light. Biology chemistry combined. Nature processes. Knowledge. Organic structures. Cellular respiration. Mitochondria. Ecosystems. Carbon cycle.

History of Rome. Empire rose over centuries. Julius Caesar changed the state. Ancient civilizations. Knowledge. Culture. Heritage. Philosophy. Democracy. Republic. Governance. Architecture.
